hintDisplay: Sujeto: mi hermano / Verbo: correr (habilidad) / Complemento: en el campeonato / Tiempo: una situación hipotética
spanishSentence: Si mi hermano no corriera más rápido, no ganaría la medalla en el campeonato.
correctSentence: If my brother did not run faster, he would not win the medal at the championship.

correctSentence: If we did not train harder, we would not win the championship.

correctSentence: If she were more dedicated, she would train every day for the championship.

correctSentence: If the athlete trained harder, he would not lose the championship final.
